subcodes.first_line: They inquired of that candle of the Divine assembly, His Holiness Shaykh Ahmad al-Ahsá'í, concerning the outcome of a matter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از شمع انجمن رحمانى حضرت شیخ مرقوم احسائی سؤال فرموده اند که مآل امرى
subcodes.subjects: @Shaykhis, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @predictions and prophecies, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria)
